data.content: Plan review approved. The current create-more path in src/components/beat-form.tsx clears the draft before calling onCreateMore() and then mutates local relationship state, which can re-trigger the draft persistence effects and repopulate stale values. Moving clearDraft() into the success callback in src/components/create-beat-dialog.tsx immediately before setFormKey() removes that race while preserving entered data on validation or network failure because submitBeat() only invokes onSuccess when result.ok is true. Removing setBlocks([]) and setBlockedBy([]) from the submit handler is safe because the keyed BeatForm remount already resets component-local relationship state, and the title input should regain focus on the new instance via existing autoFocus. Manual verification with DevTools or Playwright is sufficient for this small call-order change, though an automated regression test could be added later if this flow becomes fragile.
